name: Halley Golf
about: Halley Golf is a modern golf simulator facility founded in 2025 by Scott and Ethan Halley. The venue focuses on providing year-round access to golf through its cutting-edge simulator technology, which delivers detailed ball flight and club data analytics. With a flexible membership model and a relaxed, community-oriented atmosphere, Halley Golf caters to both seasoned players and beginners. The facility features hourly bay rentals, professional coaching services, and is developing a full kitchen to complement its current beverage and snack offerings.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology with detailed ball flight and club data
Flexible membership options with discounted rates for new members
Professional PGA coaching available for all skill levels
Relaxed community atmosphere centered around a love of golf
Year-round indoor golf experience regardless of weather

food_and_drink.notes: Currently serving snacks including ice cream bars; hot food menu coming soon with kitchen construction in progress.
Beer, wine, and cider are listed as 'Coming Soon' and not currently available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you need to bring your own. It's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue currently serves soda, sports drinks, energy drinks, bottled water, and ice cream bars. Hot food and alcohol are coming soon. BYOB policies are not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes. Bay rentals are priced per hour, so the time would depend on your group's pace.

faq.question: Is Halley Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Halley Golf appears kid-friendly with PGA coaching available for juniiors and a relaxed atmosphere suitable for families.
